docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, NOTICE OF NON APPEARANCE FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
